issues.description: Missing conditional logic: effect should only DrawCard and GiveDon if the revealed card's cost matches the chosen cost. Current DSL always executes both actions regardless of match.
TrashFromHand is correct, but the subsequent conditional reveal-and-compare mechanic is not represented. DSL lacks the opponent deck reveal check and cost comparison condition.
GiveDon action is present but should only trigger conditionally on cost match; currently unconditional in chain.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Choose a cost and reveal 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck. If the revealed card has the chosen cost, draw 1 card and add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
